hero.text: Excellence is not a skill; it's an attitude.
hero.author: Ralph Marston

aries.general: Today is a day for making bold decisions. Trust your instincts and step forward with confidence.
aries.love: Passion ignites today, bringing a spark to your relationships. Embrace the warmth.
aries.career: Opportunities arise in unexpected ways. Be ready to seize them.

taurus.general: Focus on grounding yourself today. Stability will come through patience and perseverance.
taurus.love: Nurturing your bond leads to deeper connections. Show love through small gestures.
taurus.career: Your hard work will not go unnoticed, but be open to feedback.

gemini.general: Communication is key today. Express your thoughts clearly to avoid misunderstandings.
gemini.love: A new connection could blossom through shared interests. Be open to surprises.
gemini.career: Network and collaborate with others to unlock new possibilities.

cancer.general: Embrace your emotions today; they guide you toward clarity and strength.
cancer.love: Intuition leads you to understand a partner's needs better. Listen closely.
cancer.career: Focus on creativity and innovation; your contributions can make a difference.

leo.general: Today's energy is bold and vibrant. Let your true colors shine and lead the way.
leo.love: Romance is in the air; plan a special date night to rekindle the spark.
leo.career: Your leadership skills are highlighted. Step up and take charge.

virgo.general: Organizational skills will serve you well. Tackle your to-do list with focus and determination.
virgo.love: Sharing responsibilities in your relationship strengthens your bond.
virgo.career: Attention to detail is your ally today; utilize it to perfect your work.

libra.general: Seek balance in all areas of your life. Harmony will bring peace.
libra.love: A little compromise can lead to a joyful outcome. Be ready to meet halfway.
libra.career: Collaborative efforts will bear fruit—embrace teamwork today.

scorpio.general: Trust your instincts; they are your strongest ally today. Follow your gut.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations bring you closer to your partner. Open up.
scorpio.career: Your intuition will guide you in making key decisions. Don't second-guess yourself.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons; embrace new experiences today. Let curiosity lead you.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity in romance can lead to delightful surprises. Be open-minded.
sagittarius.career: Take a leap of faith on new opportunities—trust that they will lead to growth.

capricorn.general: Your determination is palpable today. Harness it to achieve your goals.
capricorn.love: Stability in your relationship offers a foundation for growth. Cherish it.
capricorn.career: Your ambitions are clear; pursue them with diligence and patience.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas flourish today. Don't shy away from thinking outside the box.
aquarius.love: Your uniqueness attracts attention. Embrace who you are unapologetically.
aquarius.career: Seek out unconventional solutions; your creativity is a powerful tool.

pisces.general: Emotional depth can lead to profound insights today. Listen to your heart.
pisces.love: Romantic gestures will bring joy. Don't hesitate to express your feelings.
pisces.career: Your artistic skills are in the spotlight. Share your vision confidently.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
captions.author: William James

captions.text: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
captions.author: Charles R. Swindoll

captions.text: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
captions.author: Mahatma Gandhi

captions.text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
captions.author: Bo Bennett

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alfred North Whitehead

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Technology is a word that describes something that doesn’t work yet.
tech.author: Douglas Adams

tech.text: The most important thing is to keep the most important thing the most important thing.
tech.author: Don Wood

fun.text: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach photos.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would tell a joke about construction, but I’m still working on it.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The moment you doubt whether you can fly, you cease forever to be able to do it.
faith.author: J.M. Barrie

faith.text: In faith, there is enough light for those who want to believe.
faith.author: George B. TANQUARY

faith.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
faith.author: Christian D. Larson

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie Ten Boom

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you will encounter more questions than answers.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: Truth will ultimately prevail where there is pains to bring it to light.
wisdom.author: George Washington
